text:
From: Don Lewis <truckman@FreeBSD.org>
 Subject: ports/math/atlas (3.6.0_4,1) does not build with gcc 4.2.x on i386
 Date: Mon, 26 Nov 2007 14:15:14 -0800 (PST)
 
 > Either upgrade the port to the new stable version of ATLAS (3.8.0), or
 > apply the following patch to the port:
 
 Dear Don Lewis, thanks for submitting PR. I'd like to update 3.8.0.
 
 All the best,
 -- Nakata Maho (maho@FreeBSD.org)
